metadata.name: Texas Natural Resource Sites Expanded Database
metadata.description: Fresh curated database of Texas natural resource extraction, processing, storage, infrastructure, and historical sites. Coordinates are representative for educational mapping.
metadata.caution: Many records represent basins, districts, mine areas, or industrial complexes rather than exact boundaries. Do not use for legal, safety, navigation, permitting, or emergency-response decisions.
